description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, landscaped backyard. The structure features a mix of rectangular and curved volumes, with extensive use of large windows and glass doors, especially on the ground floor facing the backyard. The property includes a driveway, a swimming pool, a trampoline, a swing set, and several outdoor seating areas, all set within a neatly manicured lawn. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light and medium gray tones, with some sections appearing to use stone or concrete cladding. The backyard is enclosed by low walls, providing privacy and a clear boundary for the property. The overall design emphasizes open, functional outdoor spaces and a clean, geometric architectural style.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool, play equipment, and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a partial view of the backyard with play equipment and a trampoline.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the expansive backyard, trampoline, swing set, and the pool at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backyard, swimming pool, multiple seating areas, and large glass doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, lounge chairs, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a modern door flanked by large windows
